name: SPDR GOLD TRUST
summary: PART I SPDR Gold Trust (the Trust) is an investment trust, formed on November12, 2004 under New York law pursuant to a trust indenture (the TrustIndenture). The Trust holds gold and from time to time issues SPDR Gold Shares (the Shares) in Baskets in exchange for deposits of gold and distributes gold in connection with redemptions of Baskets. A Basket equals a block of 100,000Shares. The investment objective of the Trust is for the Shares to reflect the performance of the price of gold bullion, ...
